title: Add queryBuilder utility with quotes and dollar sign handling
description: Create src/utils/queryBuilder.ts that builds URL-encoded query strings from key-value objects. Must handle arrays by repeating the key (e.g., ?key=1&key=2), empty objects, nested objects (stringified), with values wrapped in double quotes and dollar signs ($) encoded as %24. Full test coverage in src/utils/queryBuilder.test.ts with 15 passing tests covering all requirements including quotes and dollar signs.
existing_patterns: src/utils/slugify.ts: Single-function utility with JSDoc comments and vitest co-located tests
src/utils/url-parser.ts: Uses encodeURIComponent for URL encoding
Vitest testing pattern with describe/it/expect from slugify.test.ts
